title: Colored Pillows
description: This resource pack changes the color of pillows
body:
Transform your Minecraft beds with vibrant flair! This resource pack brings a burst of color to your pillows, adding personality and charm to your in-game resting spots. Say goodbye to bland white pillows and hello to a spectrum of hues that reflect your style and imagination. Upgrade your sleep space with colorful pillow revolution today!

This resource pack revamps the default white pillows on Minecraft beds with a burst of vibrant colors. It injects personality and flair into players' sleeping spaces, offering a diverse range of hues to choose from. With this pack installed, players can customize their beds to reflect their unique style and preferences, making their in-game experience more visually appealing and immersive.

![On the top there are beds with the resource pack and on the bottom with out it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d67297708a852fd81b98a9be80a36c405e71b4.png)
